title: chore(deps): update dependency webdriverio to v5.7.1
body:

    -   [#​3690](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3690) webdriver: Fix error matcher for edge 15-17 ([@​abjerstedt](https://togithub.com/abjerstedt))
-   `wdio-webdriver-mock-service`, `webdriverio`
    -   [#​3681](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3681) webdriverio: middleware refactor ([@​abjerstedt](https://togithub.com/abjerstedt))
